title: Qliphoth Awakening
description: Adds various bosses with unique attacks and mechanics.
body:
![Qliphoth Awakening logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7942d42682434caec68c5020093bada8402e0d6f.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/V8cwHCdl0zc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## What's the mod about?
**Qliphoth Awakening** is a mod that focuses on adding various bosses, each has its own set of attacks, unique mechanics and drops. 

Before summoning a boss you will be presented an in-depth description of its attacks and mechanics, you can either read them all and be prepared, or try your skill and go in blindly.

## How to summon a boss?

First of all you need to find a boss arena that generate in world. Mod provides items such as Eye Of Chesed to ease this process.

Each arena has a special boss spawner structure inside. You need to right click it and a GUI with a boss description will open, there you will find the summon button. 

This special structure will reappear once the boss is defeated, that means if you want to do the bossfight again you don't need to search for another boss arena.

## Important!

This mod requires FDLib to work!

## Boss release status
